---
title: "Ecological Indicators Across Pressure Gradients"
author: "Jamie C. Tam"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

# setup
```{r}

library(tidyverse)
library(mgcv)
library(gratia)
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)
library(marea)
```

# ESS regional LONG indicators
```{r}
# get data
data("eco_indicators")

ei_ess<-eco_indicators[eco_indicators@data$region=="ESS"]
#collect fishing/landings pressures
pressures_ess<-ei_ess@data |> 
    select(year,
           landings_all=landings_ALL_value, 
           landings_forage=landings_FORAGE.L_value,
           landings_largepelagic=landings_LARGE_PELAGIC.L_value,
           landings_flatfish=landings_FLATFISH.L_value,
           landing_skates=landings_SKATES.L_value,
           mtl_landings=MeanTL.Landings_value,
           mti_landings=MTI.Landings_3.25_value,
           diversity_tspp=DiversityTargetSpp_ALL_value,
           fp_all=FP_ALL_value,
           fp_clupeids=FP_CLUPEIDS_value
           )

#collect environmental pressures
data("amo")
data("azmp_bottom_temperature")
data("nao")
data("azmp_stratification")

amo_annual <- amo@data |> 
  group_by(year) |> 
  summarise(amo_mean = mean(SSTA_value, na.rm = TRUE)) |> 
  filter(year %in% 1970:2022) |> 
  select(amo_mean)

nao_annual <- nao@data |> 
  filter(year %in% 1970:2022) |> 
  select(nao=anomaly_value)

stratification_annual <-azmp_stratification@data |> 
  filter(year %in% 1970:2022) |> 
  select(stratification=mean_value)

salinity_annual <-azmp_salinity@data |> 
  filter(year %in% 1970:2022) |> 
  select(salinity=mean_value)

bottom_temp <- azmp_bottom_temperature@data |> 
    filter(region %in% c("4Vn", "4Vs", "4W"), year %in% 1970:2022) %>%
    group_by(year) %>%
    summarise(bottom_temp = mean(mean_value, na.rm = FALSE)) %>%
    complete(year=1970:2022) |> 
  mutate(
    b_temp = zoo::na.approx(bottom_temp, na.rm = FALSE)) |> 
  select(bottom_temp=b_temp)

#from azmpdata 
cil_volume <- azmpdata::Derived_Annual_Broadscale |>
  select(area, year, cold_intermediate_layer_volume) |>
  filter(area == "scotian_shelf_grid") |>
  complete(year = 1970:2022) |>
  arrange(year) |>
mutate(
    # convert zeros to NA
    cold_intermediate_layer_volume = na_if(cold_intermediate_layer_volume, 0),
    
    # then impute
    cil_volume = zoo::na.approx(
      cold_intermediate_layer_volume,
      na.rm = FALSE)
) |> 
  filter(year %in% 1970:2022) |> 
  select(cil_volume)

#ice_volume derived from ice.max
dat<-gslea::EA.query.f(years=1900:2022, variables=c("ice.max"), EARs=1:7)

 ice_max_volume <- dat |> #sum ice.max across all EAR (gulf regions)
    group_by(year) |>
    summarise(
        total_ice_max = sum(value, na.rm = TRUE)
    )
 ice_vol<-ice_max_volume |> 
   mutate(ice_vol=total_ice_max/3) |>  #back of the envelope calculation based on comparisons with benoit's data in azmpdata
   add_row(year = 1975, ice_vol = NA) |> #missing 1975
   filter(year>= 1970, year<=2022) |> 
   select(ice_vol)

env_ess <- dplyr::bind_cols(
  tibble(year = 1970:2022),
  bottom_temp,
  nao_annual,
  amo_annual,
  stratification_annual,
  salinity_annual,
  ice_vol,
  cil_volume
)


#bind everything
pressures_ess <- dplyr::left_join(pressures_ess, env_ess, by = "year")

#remove weird 2021 fpall value >3, probably also weird
pressures_ess[52,"fp_all"]<-NA

indicators_ess<-ei_ess@data |> 
    select(year,
           heips=Heips_ALL_value,
           lfi=LargeFishIndicator_value,
           mla=MeanLengthABUNDANCE_value,
           condition_finfish=CCondition_FINFISH_value,
           condition_zoopiscivore=CCondition_ZOOPISCIVORE_value, 
           mls=MeanLifespan_value,
           biomass_all=BIOMASS_ALL_value,
           biomass_flatfish=BIOMASS_FLATFISH_value,
           biomass_gadoids=BIOMASS_GADOIDS_value,
           biomass_skates=BIOMASS_SKATES_value,
           biomass_forage=BIOMASS_FORAGE_value,
           ivi_landings=IVILandings_value
           )
mtlc<-mtlc_esswss |> 
  filter(ID %in% "ESS") |> 
  select(MeanTLCommunity)
#join columns
indicators_ess<-cbind(indicators_ess, mtlc)


ess_data <- list(
  year = 1970:2022,
  indicators = indicators_ess,
  pressures = pressures_ess
)


```

# WSS regional LONG indicators
```{r}
# get data
data("eco_indicators")

ei_wss<-eco_indicators[eco_indicators@data$region=="WSS"]
#collect fishing/landings pressures
pressures_wss<-ei_wss@data |> 
    select(year,
           landings_all=landings_ALL_value, 
           landings_forage=landings_FORAGE.L_value,
           landings_largepelagic=landings_LARGE_PELAGIC.L_value,
           landings_flatfish=landings_FLATFISH.L_value,
           landing_skates=landings_SKATES.L_value,
           mtl_landings=MeanTL.Landings_value,
           mti_landings=MTI.Landings_3.25_value,
           diversity_tspp=DiversityTargetSpp_ALL_value,
           fp_all=FP_ALL_value,
           fp_clupeids=FP_CLUPEIDS_value
           )

#collect environmental pressures
data("amo")
data("azmp_bottom_temperature")
data("nao")
data("azmp_salinity")

amo_annual <- amo@data |> 
  group_by(year) |> 
  summarise(amo_mean = mean(SSTA_value, na.rm = TRUE)) |> 
  filter(year %in% 1970:2022) |> 
  select(amo_mean)

nao_annual <- nao@data |> 
  filter(year %in% 1970:2022) |> 
  select(nao=anomaly_value)

salinity_annual <-azmp_salinity@data |> 
  filter(year %in% 1970:2022) |> 
  select(salinity=mean_value)

stratification_annual <-azmp_stratification@data |> 
  filter(year %in% 1970:2022) |> 
  select(stratification=mean_value)

bottom_temp<-azmp_bottom_temperature@data |> 
  filter(region %in% "4X") |>
  filter(year %in% 1970:2022) |> 
  complete(year=1970:2022) |> 
  select(bottom_temp=mean_value)

#from azmpdata 
cil_volume <- azmpdata::Derived_Annual_Broadscale |>
  select(area, year, cold_intermediate_layer_volume) |>
  filter(area == "scotian_shelf_grid") |>
  complete(year = 1970:2022) |>
  arrange(year) |>
mutate(
    # convert zeros to NA
    cold_intermediate_layer_volume = na_if(cold_intermediate_layer_volume, 0),
    
    # then impute
    cil_volume = zoo::na.approx(
      cold_intermediate_layer_volume,
      na.rm = FALSE)
) |> 
  filter(year %in% 1970:2022) |> 
  select(cil_volume)

#ice_volume derived from ice.max
dat<-gslea::EA.query.f(years=1900:2022, variables=c("ice.max"), EARs=1:7)

 ice_max_volume <- dat |> #sum ice.max across all EAR (gulf regions)
    group_by(year) |>
    summarise(
        total_ice_max = sum(value, na.rm = TRUE)
    )
 ice_vol<-ice_max_volume |> 
   mutate(ice_vol=total_ice_max/3) |>  #back of the envelope calculation based on comparisons with benoit's data in azmpdata
   add_row(year = 1975, ice_vol = NA) |> #missing 1975
   filter(year>= 1970, year<=2022) |> 
   select(ice_vol)
 
 
env_wss <- dplyr::bind_cols(
  tibble(year = 1970:2022),
  bottom_temp,
  nao_annual,
  amo_annual,
  stratification_annual,
  salinity_annual,
  ice_vol,
  cil_volume
)

#bind everything
pressures_wss <- dplyr::left_join(pressures_wss, env_wss, by = "year")

#remove weird 2021 fpall value >3, probably also weird
pressures_wss[52,"fp_all"]<-NA

indicators_wss<-ei_wss@data |> 
    select(year,
           heips=Heips_ALL_value,
           lfi=LargeFishIndicator_value,
           mla=MeanLengthABUNDANCE_value,
           condition_finfish=CCondition_FINFISH_value,
           condition_zoopiscivore=CCondition_ZOOPISCIVORE_value, 
           mls=MeanLifespan_value,
           biomass_all=BIOMASS_ALL_value,
           biomass_flatfish=BIOMASS_FLATFISH_value,
           biomass_gadoids=BIOMASS_GADOIDS_value,
           biomass_skates=BIOMASS_SKATES_value,
           biomass_forage=BIOMASS_FORAGE_value,
           ivi_landings=IVILandings_value
           )
mtlc<-mtlc_esswss |> 
  filter(ID %in% "WSS") |> 
  select(MeanTLCommunity)
#join columns
indicators_wss<-cbind(indicators_wss, mtlc)


wss_data <- list(
  year = 1970:2022,
  indicators = indicators_wss,
  pressures = pressures_wss
)


```

#set region
```{r}
run_full_pipeline <- function(indicators, pressures, region = "ess") {

  pairs <- build_model_pairs(indicators, pressures)

  model_list <- fit_all_models(pairs, indicators, pressures)

  comparison_results <- extract_all_diagnostics(model_list)

  model_selection <- select_best_models(comparison_results)

  threshold_results <- compute_all_thresholds(model_list, model_selection)

  slope_results <- compute_slope_bootstraps(model_list, model_selection)

  combined_plot <- plot_and_save_models(
    model_selection,
    model_list,
    slope_results,
    threshold_results,
    region = region,
    out_dir = here::here("figures", region)
  )

  return(list(
    models = model_list,
    selection = model_selection,
    thresholds = threshold_results,
    slopes = slope_results,
    plot = combined_plot
  ))
}

region <- "ess"

fig_dir <- here::here("figures", region)
res_dir <- here::here("results", region)

dir.create(fig_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create(res_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
```


# Step 0. global methods
```{r}
fit_method <- "REML"
use_select <- TRUE
gamma_val  <- 1.4

tolerance <- 0.01
alpha     <- 0.08

n_grid  <- 300
min_run <- 5
```


# 1. model pairs
```{r}
build_model_pairs <- function(indicators, pressures) {
  expand.grid(
    response  = names(indicators),
    predictor = names(pressures),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
}
```

# 2. AR1 + Model fitting
```{r}
estimate_rho <- function(model) {
  ac <- acf(residuals(model), plot = FALSE, na.action = na.pass)
  rho <- ac$acf[2]
  if (!is.finite(rho)) rho <- 0
  rho
}

```

# core fit functions
```{r}
fit_single_pair <- function(response, predictor, indicators, pressures) {

  df <- data.frame(
    year = indicators$year,
    y    = indicators[[response]],
    x    = pressures[[predictor]]
  ) |> na.omit()

  if (nrow(df) < 10 || var(df$x) == 0 || var(df$y) == 0) return(NULL)

  df$AR_start <- c(TRUE, diff(df$year) != 1)

  # Initial GAM for rho
  gam0 <- try(mgcv::gam(y ~ s(x), data = df), silent = TRUE)
  if (inherits(gam0, "try-error")) return(NULL)

  rho_est <- estimate_rho(gam0)

  # ---- GAM
  gam_model <- try(
    mgcv::bam(y ~ s(x),
              data = df,
              family = tw(),
              method = fit_method,
              select = use_select,
              gamma  = gamma_val,
              rho = rho_est,
              AR.start = df$AR_start,
              discrete = TRUE),
    silent = TRUE
  )

  # ---- GLM
  glm_model <- try(
    mgcv::bam(y ~ x,
              data = df,
              family = tw(),
              method = fit_method,
              rho = rho_est,
              AR.start = df$AR_start,
              discrete = TRUE),
    silent = TRUE
  )

  # ---- TGAM
  tgam_model <- try(
    fit_threshold_gam(
      df = rename(df, !!response := y, !!predictor := x),
      resp = response,
      pres = predictor,
      rho = rho_est
    ),
    silent = TRUE
  )

  base <- paste(response, predictor, sep = "_vs_")

  list(
    !!paste0(base, "_GAM")  := if (!inherits(gam_model, "try-error")) gam_model else NULL,
    !!paste0(base, "_GLM")  := if (!inherits(glm_model, "try-error")) glm_model else NULL,
    !!paste0(base, "_TGAM") := if (!inherits(tgam_model, "try-error")) tgam_model else NULL
  )
}

fit_all_models <- function(pairs, indicators, pressures) {

  out <- lapply(seq_len(nrow(pairs)), function(i) {

    res <- fit_single_pair(
      pairs$response[i],
      pairs$predictor[i],
      indicators,
      pressures
    )

    res[!sapply(res, is.null)]
  })

  do.call(c, out)
}
```

# 3. Diagnostic Extractions
```{r}
extract_model_metrics <- function(model_name, model) {

  smry <- summary(model)

  parts <- strsplit(model_name, "_vs_")[[1]]
  response  <- parts[1]
  predictor <- sub("_.*$", "", parts[2])
  model_type <- sub("^.*_", "", parts[2])

  data.frame(
    Response   = response,
    Predictor  = predictor,
    Model_Type = model_type,
    AIC        = AIC(model),
    R_squared  = smry$r.sq,
    EDF        = sum(model$edf),
    Score      = model$gcv.ubre,
    p_value    = tryCatch({
      if (model_type == "GLM") smry$p.table[2, 4]
      else if (!is.null(smry$s.table)) smry$s.table[1, 4]
      else NA
    }, error = function(e) NA),
    Threshold  = if (model_type == "TGAM") attr(model, "threshold") else NA,
    rho        = if (!is.null(model$rho)) model$rho else NA,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
}

extract_all_diagnostics <- function(model_list) {
  bind_rows(
    lapply(names(model_list), function(nm) {
      tryCatch(extract_model_metrics(nm, model_list[[nm]]), error = function(e) NULL)
    })
  )
}


```

# 4. model selection
```{r}
select_best_models <- function(df) {

  df %>%
    group_by(Response, Predictor) %>%
    mutate(
      best_score = min(Score[Model_Type != "TGAM"], na.rm = TRUE),
      tgam_score = ifelse(Model_Type == "TGAM", Score, NA),
      tgam_p = ifelse(Model_Type == "TGAM", p_value, NA),
      tgam_within_tol = tgam_score <= best_score * (1 + tolerance),
      tgam_sig = tgam_p < alpha,
      prefer_tgam = tgam_sig | tgam_within_tol
    ) %>%
    arrange(desc(prefer_tgam & Model_Type == "TGAM"), Score) %>%
    slice(1) %>%
    ungroup()
}

```

# 5. Threshold module
```{r}
compute_all_thresholds <- function(model_list, model_selection) {

  results <- lapply(seq_len(nrow(model_selection)), function(i) {

    row <- model_selection[i, ]
    key <- paste0(row$Response, "_vs_", row$Predictor, "_", row$Model_Type)
    model <- model_list[[key]]

    if (row$Model_Type == "TGAM") {
      return(data.frame(
        Model = key,
        Threshold = attr(model, "threshold")
      ))
    }

    if (row$Model_Type == "GAM") {
      cr <- robust_gam_crossings(model, row$Predictor)
      return(data.frame(
        Model = key,
        Crossing = paste(cr$Derivative_Zero_Crossing, collapse = ", ")
      ))
    }

    NULL
  })

  bind_rows(results)
}
```

# 6. Slope bootstrap model
```{r}
compute_slope_bootstraps <- function(model_list, model_selection) {

  res <- list()

  for (i in seq_len(nrow(model_selection))) {

    row <- model_selection[i, ]
    if (row$Model_Type != "GAM") next

    key <- paste0(row$Response, "_vs_", row$Predictor, "_GAM")

    slope_df <- bootstrap_gam_slope(
      model_list[[key]],
      predictor = row$Predictor,
      B = 200,
      n_grid = 300
    )

    res[[key]] <- slope_df
  }

  bind_rows(res)
}
```

# 7 best model table 
```{r}
build_best_models_table <- function(selection, threshold_results) {

  selection %>%
    mutate(Model = paste0(Response, "_vs_", Predictor, "_", Model_Type)) %>%
    left_join(threshold_results, by = "Model") %>%
    arrange(Response, Predictor)
}

```

# 8. plotting
```{r}
plot_and_save_models <- function(selection, model_list,
                                 slope_df = NULL,
                                 threshold_df = NULL,
                                 region = "region",
                                 out_dir = "figures") {

  dir.create(out_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

  plot_list <- list()

  for (i in seq_len(nrow(selection))) {

    row <- selection[i, ]
    response   <- row$Response
    predictor  <- row$Predictor
    model_type <- row$Model_Type

    key <- paste0(response, "_vs_", predictor, "_", model_type)
    model <- model_list[[key]]
    if (is.null(model)) next

    # --- prediction grid ---
    xvals <- seq(min(model$model[[predictor]], na.rm = TRUE),
                 max(model$model[[predictor]], na.rm = TRUE),
                 length.out = 300)

    nd <- setNames(data.frame(xvals), predictor)

    # TGAM hinge
    thr <- NA_real_
    if (model_type == "TGAM") {
      thr <- attr(model, "threshold")
      nd$hinge <- pmax(0, nd[[predictor]] - thr)
    }

    # Predictions
    nd$fit <- predict(model, newdata = nd, type = "response")

    # --- base plot ---
    p <- ggplot(model$model,
                aes(x = .data[[predictor]],
                    y = .data[[response]])) +
      geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
      geom_line(data = nd,
                aes(x = .data[[predictor]], y = fit),
                linewidth = 1.1,
                color = "black") +
      theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
      labs(
        title = paste(response, "~", predictor),
        subtitle = paste("Model:", model_type),
        x = predictor,
        y = response
      )

    # --- TGAM threshold line ---
    if (model_type == "TGAM" && is.finite(thr)) {
      p <- p + geom_vline(xintercept = thr,
                          linetype = "dashed",
                          color = "red")
    }

    # --- GAM slope overlay (optional shading) ---
    if (!is.null(slope_df)) {
      sd <- slope_df %>% dplyr::filter(Model == key)
      if (nrow(sd) > 0) {
        sig <- with(sd, slope_q025 > 0 | slope_q975 < 0)
        if (any(sig, na.rm = TRUE)) {
          p <- p +
            geom_ribbon(
              data = data.frame(x = sd[[predictor]], sig = sig),
              aes(x = x, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf),
              inherit.aes = FALSE,
              alpha = 0.05,
              fill = "orange"
            )
        }
      }
    }

    # ------------ SAVE INDIVIDUAL PLOT ------------
    file_name <- paste0(
      region, "_",
      response, "_vs_", predictor, "_",
      model_type, ".png"
    )

    ggsave(
      filename = file.path(out_dir, file_name),
      plot = p,
      width = 5, height = 4,
      dpi = 400
    )

    plot_list[[key]] <- p
  }

  # ------------ COMBINED GRID ------------
  combined_plot <- patchwork::wrap_plots(plot_list)

  ggsave(
    filename = file.path(out_dir, paste0("combined_", region, ".png")),
    plot = combined_plot,
    width = 16, height = 12,
    dpi = 500
  )

  return(combined_plot)
}

plot_and_save_derivatives <- function(selection,
                                      slope_df,
                                      region = "region",
                                      out_dir = "figures") {

  if (is.null(slope_df) || nrow(slope_df) == 0) return(NULL)

  dir.create(out_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

  plot_list <- list()

  for (i in seq_len(nrow(selection))) {

    row <- selection[i, ]
    if (row$Model_Type != "GAM") next

    key <- paste0(row$Response, "_vs_", row$Predictor, "_GAM")

    sd <- slope_df %>% dplyr::filter(Model == key)
    if (nrow(sd) == 0) next

    p <- ggplot(sd,
                aes(x = .data[[row$Predictor]], y = slope_med)) +
      geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = slope_q025, ymax = slope_q975),
                  fill = "steelblue", alpha = 0.25) +
      geom_line(color = "steelblue4") +
      geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
      theme_minimal() +
      labs(
        title = paste0(row$Response, " ~ ", row$Predictor, " (slope)"),
        y = "Derivative",
        x = row$Predictor
      )

    file_name <- paste0(
      region, "_deriv_",
      row$Response, "_vs_", row$Predictor, ".png"
    )

    ggsave(
      filename = file.path(out_dir, file_name),
      plot = p,
      width = 5, height = 4,
      dpi = 400
    )

    plot_list[[key]] <- p
  }

  if (length(plot_list)) {
    grid <- patchwork::wrap_plots(plot_list)

    ggsave(
      file.path(out_dir, paste0("derivatives_", region, ".png")),
      grid,
      width = 16, height = 12,
      dpi = 500
    )

    return(grid)
  }
}

combined_plot <- plot_and_save_models(
  model_selection,
  model_list,
  slope_results,
  threshold_results,
  region = region,
  out_dir = here::here("figures", region)
)

deriv_plot <- plot_and_save_derivatives(
  model_selection,
  slope_results,
  region = region,
  out_dir = here::here("figures", region)
)

```

# 9. save results
```{r}
path <- here::here("results", paste0("ei_threshold_results_", region, ".RData"))

save_results <- function(path) {

  save(
    best_models_table,
    model_selection,
    comparison_results,
    model_list,
    file = path
  )
}
```
